ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_data" (
  "clinical_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical data entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "baseline_psa" REAL /* Baseline PSA level */,
  "baseline_ldh_uln" REAL /* Baseline LDH / ULN */,
  "baseline_alp_uln" REAL /* Baseline ALP / ULN */,
  "baseline_ctdna_yield_ng_ml_plasma" REAL /* Baseline ctDNA yield (ng/mL plasma) */,
  "baseline_ctdna_percentage" REAL /* Baseline ctDNA percentage */,
  "date_of_measurement" TEXT /* Date of clinical measurement */,
  "gleason_score" INTEGER /* Gleason score for prostate cancer grading */,
  "tnm_stage" TEXT /* TNM stage of the cancer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinical_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "genomic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "ar_amplification" TEXT /* AR amplification status */,
  "ar_rearrangement" TEXT /* AR rearrangement status */,
  "ar_mutation" TEXT /* AR mutation status */,
  "pi3k_pathway_defect" TEXT /* PI3K pathway defect status */,
  "wnt_pathway_defect" TEXT /* WNT pathway defect status */,
  "mutation_details" TEXT /* Detailed information on mutations */,
  "genomic_test_date" TEXT /* Date of genomic testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "treatment_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "days_to_progression_or_last_followup" INTEGER /* Days to progression or last follow-up */,
  "progression_censorship" TEXT /* Progression censorship status */,
  "days_to_death_or_last_followup" INTEGER /* Days to death or last follow-up */,
  "survival_censorship" TEXT /* Survival censorship status */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment administered */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Notable side effects experienced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metastases" (
  "metastasis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metastasis entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "bone_metastases" TEXT /* Bone metastases status */,
  "lung_metastases" TEXT /* Lung metastases status */,
  "liver_metastases" TEXT /* Liver metastases status */,
  "metastasis_date" TEXT /* Date of metastasis detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metastasis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metastases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psa_response" (
  "psa_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PSA response entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "best_psa_response" REAL /* Best PSA response within first 12 weeks (% change) */,
  "psa_test_date" TEXT /* Date of PSA test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psa_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_psa_response_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomicpanels" (
  "genomic_panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic panel entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "panel_type" TEXT /* Type of genomic panel (e.g., 72-gene panel, exome, AR panel) */,
  "panel_results" TEXT /* Summary of panel findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomic_panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomicpanels_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "germline_hrr_defect" (
  "germline_hrr_defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each germline HRR defect entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hrr_defect_status" TEXT /* Germline HRR defect status (e.g., None, p.W742C) */,
  "defect_details" TEXT /* Detailed information on the defect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("germline_hrr_defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_germline_hrr_defect_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "somatic_truncating_hrr_defect" (
  "somatic_truncating_hrr_defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each somatic truncating HRR defect entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hrr_defect_status" TEXT /* Somatic truncating HRR defect status (e.g., None, High) */,
  "defect_details" TEXT /* Detailed information on the defect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("somatic_truncating_hrr_defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_somatic_truncating_hrr_defect_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brca2_atm_deletion" (
  "brca2_atm_deletion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BRCA2/ATM deletion entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "deletion_status" TEXT /* BRCA2/ATM deletion status (e.g., None, PTEN deletion) */,
  "deletion_details" TEXT /* Detailed information on the deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brca2_atm_deletion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brca2_atm_deletion_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
